name: ViewSonic VA1653 16" Full HD USB-C Lightweight Portable Monitor - 1920x1080 - 7ms GTG - 60Hz Refresh Rate - Internal 0.8Watts Speakers - Mini-HDMI - 2x USB 3.2 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - Built-in Foldable Stand (VA1653)
shortName: ViewSonic VA1653 16" Full HD USB-C Lightweight Portable Monitor
description: 16-inch lightweight portable IPS monitor with 1920x1080 resolution, 60Hz refresh rate, dual USB-C, and foldable stand for mobile professionals.
